bugs_fixed: T-SQL string '+' concatenation built DateRangeID via numeric addition in Databricks (e.g. '20260621'+'1231' -> 20261852). Fixed to '||' for all DateRangeID computations.
MERGE ... OUTPUT $action INTO #outputdata (changed-CID capture) was migrated as a blanket 'WHERE DateRangeID <> today' capturing all history. Fixed by capturing changed+open CIDs before the MERGE.
Accumulated 8-digit garbage DateRangeID rows from earlier buggy runs shadowed CIDs in the MERGE (matched but failed open predicate, so never inserted via NOT MATCHED). Purged as POC side-repair.
park_reason: SCD-2 partial-replication limitation: migration schema holds a single source snapshot, so gold's full day-keyed open-snapshot history cannot be reconstructed. After fixing 3 real dialect/logic bugs and side-repairing the baseline, target-day output reached 13226/48844 rows. Remaining gap is CIDs whose last snapshot predates the one prior day we can bootstrap from gold.
